description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWram iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpdate your casual style with this green T-shirt from probase.
